title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 71.500 - Joint fire department — bonds to be registered
text:
71.500.  Joint fire department — bonds to be registered. — The bonds to be issued under sections 71.400 to 71.510 shall be registered in the office of the state auditor in the manner prescribed by law.
(RSMo 1939 § 7401) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 7250
